textByHashes.0b76f66bdb5f2d8e241a670266a2ceb61f85534f: Be ye mad? There be Horrors in this cave!
textByHashes.99332253721b065c625fd40a66a5a21b78350557: Have ye ever heard of the sort of evil, flesh-eatin' horrors that dwell in the darkest pits of the world?
textByHashes.a0afd9ad0fb356816e4486a9360dd60aaa6e2775: The sort of dark, sanity-breakin' THINGS that cause the livin' to drop to their knees and weep for the fate of all creation?
textByHashes.613f1d247d190399dd487f59149f6a01eb1bede8: But, ye'll need a Witchwood Icon from a slayer master if ye want te go in these caves and live.
textByHashes.e23d8bc035ff306f90c308dc92e784d11ff42dac: Well, ye see them Jungle Horrors? Well down in the caves there be Cave Horrors.
textByHashes.8568d380aff0dbe4493a419ea60569dffe4c36eb: They are bigger, badder, meaner, and have a howl that freezes the blood in yer veins.
textByHashes.2aa8e3e334ae01029f7666e1eb611f47b1ec3900: Wearin' earmuffs or a helmet won't work, cos them masks they wear make the sound magical. Only thing that works is wearin' a Witchwood Icon.
textByHashes.3feee8188026b51a4815e1e130f037b9a77cebc4: That is, o'course, if ye can see them, cos if ye don't have any light down there then yer likely te be picked te bones by the insects before the Horrors get ye.
textByHashes.b02113b68d10b7be59df12fdd4e408d165b8d0bc: Be ye some form of simpleton? Do ye not hear the howlin' of the Horrors?
textByHashes.02eca5831c419125ba293502b99a326f829b4552: That be them, howlin', always howlin'!
textByHashes.715dc080faefd1233b4888b7553e43c6f1ef1ef7: If ye value yer limbs ye'll put that Icon round yer neck, and hope they don't come out into the light!
textByHashes.b5185cbde5340bc83e10e64773bf52aa80e54084: Be ye here te deal with the Horrors?
textByHashes.2a1df5e0219b7b1b33489d4f215c35b27ed634e8: Aye, well, keep yer Icon with ye if ye wants te walk out alive again.
